sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90228" key="prosumbiba/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσυμ-βῐβάζω</orth>, <sense id="n90228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accommodate beforehand</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προσβιβάζω</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:14p.450M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14p.450M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
